An '''unidentified [[Jabiimi]]''' was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[subjugation of Jabiim]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She and her husband [[Goran (Kalist VI)|Goran]] were two of the prisoners sent to the [[Prison/Legends|detention center]] on [[Kalist VI/Legends|Kalist VI]]. [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Clynn]] attempted to rape her, but she was saved by [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]], who held Clynn at [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] point.
